calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Hearing On Default Judgment Prove Up
Off Calendar Mar-27-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Deborah Neville, CSR 703.

Carlos J. Rosario, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, CALIFORNIA RESTAURANT MUTUAL BENEFIT CORPORATION.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) GLOBE EATS, INC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Declarations filed in support of Request for Default Prove-up are admitted in evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $37,834.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $3,059.15
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $646.57
Total Judgment in the amount of $41,539.72
Judgment signed in open court.

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Complt
Off Calendar Sep-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:

PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA RESTAURANT MUTUAL BENEFIT CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Complaint is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185. =(302/LCN)

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Complt
Off Calendar Sep-19-2013 Continued To Sep-27-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.
(Mr. Joseph Manzare, owner of Globe Eats was present at the hearing.)

The matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA RESTAURANT MUTUAL BENEFIT CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Complaint is continued to September 27, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302, to give the moving party a chance to comply with SF Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party shall provide a courtesy copy of its papers by September 20, 2013, with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
